title: 2026 Golden Globe Awards: Best Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy Winner
text: The 83rd Annual Golden Globe Awards ceremony took place on January 11, 2026, with several major winners across film and television categories. "One Battle After Another" claimed the top prize in the Best Motion Picture – Musical or Comedy category. Directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, the film dominated the evening with multiple wins. Beyond the musical/comedy award, it also secured victories for Best Director, Best Screenplay, and Best Performance by a Female Actor in a Supporting Role. The film competed against five other nominees: Blue Moon, Bugonia, Marty Supreme, No Other Choice, and Nouvelle Vague. The film's success extended beyond the comedy category. The production garnered recognition across several performance categories, with cast and crew members recognized for their contributions to Paul Thomas Anderson's popular drama that "took home the hardware" in multiple competitive categories throughout the evening.
